title: viola × mantziana
intro: Viola × mantziana, also known as the hybrid pansy or viola hybrid, is a plant species within the Viola genus, resulting from the cross-breeding of different viola species. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Viola × mantziana include its potential to reduce anxiety and stress, improve sleep quality, and even have a positive effect on the immune system. The herbal preparations of Viola × mantziana typically involve infusions, tinctures, or teas made from its leaves, flowers, or roots, although further research is needed to confirm its safety and efficacy for medicinal use.
